goal: Celtic Cross reading page: center cross cards (#1 situation + #2 challenge) rendered ~half the size of the other 8
symptom: On the Celtic Cross result, card #1 (and crossing #2) were smaller than cards 3-10 (30px vs 60px on mobile).
root_cause: #1/#2 live inside .celtic-slot--center which was display:flex; as flex children their width:100% didn't resolve to the grid-cell width so the cards collapsed (height-driven by the tall flex row).
fix: reading.css: .celtic-slot--center -> display:block; .celtic-slot--situation width:100%; center+challenge card images width:100%/height:auto. #2 stays absolute + rotated 90 as the crossing card.
verified: chrome-mine MCP: rendered the real celtic DOM with actual reading.css -> situation #1 now 60px == others (was 30); confirmed at 390px and 900px
notes: reading.css loads after styles.css so same-specificity overrides win. On-screen result only; poster unaffected.
